sourcesContent:
const plants = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "Solar Plant A",
    location: "Gujarat, India",
    capacity: "50 kW",
    images: [
      "/images/A.jpeg",
      "/images/B.jpeg",
      "/images/C.jpeg",
      "/images/D.jpeg"
    ],
    description: "Rooftop installation with fixed-tilt panels. Operational since 2022."
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: "Solar Plant B",
    location: "Rajasthan, India",
    capacity: "30 kW",
    images: [
      "/images/E.jpeg",
      "/images/F.jpeg",
      "/images/G.jpeg",
      "/images/H.jpeg"
    ],
    description: "Ground-mounted array. Includes string inverters and remote monitoring."
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: "Solar Plant C",
    location: "Maharashtra, India",
    capacity: "75 kW",
    images: [
      "/images/I.jpeg",
      "/images/J.jpeg",
      "/images/K.jpeg",
      "/images/L.jpeg"
    ],
    description: "Commercial rooftop installation powering a factory unit."
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: "Solar Plant D",
    location: "Karnataka, India",
    capacity: "100 kW",
    images: [
      "/images/M.jpeg",
      "/images/N.jpeg",
      "/images/O.jpeg",
      "/images/P.jpeg"
    ],
    description: "Large ground-mounted solar park with SCADA telemetry."
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: "Solar Plant E",
    location: "Telangana, India",
    capacity: "25 kW",
    images: [
      "/images/Q.jpeg",
      "/images/R.jpeg",
      "/images/S.jpeg",
      "/images/T.jpeg"
    ],
    description: "Community rooftop project with net-metering."
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: "Solar Plant F",
    location: " India",
    capacity: "5 kW",
    images: [
      "/images/U.jpeg",
      "/images/V.jpeg",
      "/images/W.jpeg",
      "/images/X.jpeg"
    ],
    description: "Community rooftop project with net-metering."
  }
];

export default plants;
